subtitle_text: Hi, my name is Anna.
rationale: Cau rat ngan, tu vung co ban, cau truc gioi thieu quen thuoc.

subtitle_text: I need some help with my homework.
rationale: Tu thong dung, y nghia ro rang, ngu phap don gian.

subtitle_text: Where are you going after school?
rationale: Cau hoi thong dung, do dai ngan, de hieu voi nguoi moi.

subtitle_text: She goes to the library every weekend.
rationale: Cau khang dinh co ban, tu vung quen thuoc.

subtitle_text: Can you open the window, please?
rationale: Mau cau xin phep quen thuoc, rat phu hop beginner.

subtitle_text: We were waiting for the bus when it started raining.
rationale: Co hai hanh dong trong qua khu, ngu phap phuc tap hon easy.

subtitle_text: I have never seen anything like this before.
rationale: Co present perfect va cum tu truu tuong hon.

subtitle_text: If you study a little every day, you will improve quickly.
rationale: Co cau dieu kien loai 1, van de nhung da phuc tap hon.

subtitle_text: He said he might be late because the traffic was terrible.
rationale: Co menh de phu va reported speech co ban.

subtitle_text: Although she was nervous, she delivered the presentation well.
rationale: Co lien tu phuc va hai menh de.

subtitle_text: Could you let me know whether the documents were approved?
rationale: Cau lich su kem menh de gian tiep, kho hon muc co ban.

subtitle_text: The plan sounded simple at first, but it turned out to be far more complicated.
rationale: Tu vung va y nghia truu tuong hon, cau dai hon.

subtitle_text: Had I known the consequences, I would have acted differently.
rationale: Dao ngu dieu kien va cau truc conditional nang.

subtitle_text: The proposal was rejected despite its apparent practicality.
rationale: Tu vung hoc thuat va bi dong lam tang do kho.

subtitle_text: He tends to mask his frustration with dry, sarcastic humor.
rationale: Cum tu truu tuong va sac thai nghia kho.

subtitle_text: What we are witnessing is merely the beginning of a much larger crisis.
rationale: Tu vung hoc thuat, ngu nghia truu tuong.

subtitle_text: You gotta be kidding me, this is messed up beyond repair.
rationale: Nhieu slang, noi nhanh, co tieng noi tu nhien kho nghe.

subtitle_text: I cannot fathom why they would deliberately withhold that information.
rationale: Tu vung hiem nhu fathom, deliberately, withhold.

subtitle_text: By the time we arrived, the suspects had already fled the premises.
rationale: Qua khu hoan thanh va tu vung theo ngu canh dieu tra.

subtitle_text: Not only was the data incomplete, but the methodology itself was fundamentally flawed.
rationale: Dao ngu, bi dong, tu vung hoc thuat va phe binh.
